evaluation_setup.note: Numbers below are means over 20 episodes per (policy, category) cell. Seeded deterministically 0..19. Reproduce with `make grade`.

policies.do_nothing: Always emits action_id=13 (WAIT). Demonstrates the reward floor.
policies.random: Uniform sample from the 15 actions; target selected from observation when applicable. Demonstrates a non-trivial baseline.
policies.expert: Hand-crafted per-category heuristic policy. Demonstrates the environment is learnable and reward shaping is sensible.

notes: The large do_nothing penalty on email_triage and message_reply comes from ignoring urgent messages from close contacts — the `relationship_health` and `user_satisfaction` dimensions sum to meaningful negatives over a full episode.

A competent PPO agent should land between random and expert at minimum; well-trained agents should beat the scripted expert by exploiting combinations (batch_action for noise + draft_reply for urgent) that the rule-based expert uses monotonically.
All six scenario categories are solvable — no unsolvable edge cases. If a seed produces an anomalously low expert score (<0), file an issue with the seed.
